description:
You are a Computer User Support Specialist performing end-of-week ticket cleanup in FreeScout. In the 'IT Support' mailbox, change the status of the following resolved conversations to Closed: "Printer driver installed successfully", "VPN access restored for remote team", and "Password reset completed for jsmith". Ensure that "Ongoing network latency in Building C" and "New laptop request for onboarding" remain open.

Admin credentials:
- URL: http://localhost:8080
- Email: admin@helpdesk.local
- Password: Admin123!

target_conversations: VPN access restored for remote team
keep_open_conversations: Ongoing network latency in Building C
